title: TV & Mount Recommendations Config
description: Configuration schema for Symphony Smart Homes TV & Mount Recommendations PDF generator

project_name.description: Short project identifier, e.g. '84 Aspen Meadow'

project_address.description: Full address used in the filename and footer, e.g. '84_Aspen_Meadow'

client_name.description: Client's name as it will appear in the document, e.g. 'Steve Topletz'

client_first_name.description: Client's first name used in direct address, e.g. 'Steve'. Falls back to client_name if omitted.

intro_paragraph.description: Custom introductory paragraph text. If omitted, a generic paragraph is generated.

key_takeaway.description: Bold callout box text for the key takeaway on the intro page.

c4_warning_text.description: Custom text for the orange warning callout box about the client's current selections and C4 integration issues.

packages_intro.description: Introductory paragraph for the packages section. If omitted, a generic paragraph is generated.

client_tv_schedule.description: The client's original TV selections, used in the price volatility table

c4_integration.description: C4 integration method: 'Native SDDP', '3rd-Party Driver', 'IR', or 'None'

price_low.description: Lowest observed price string, e.g. '$2,999 (Best Buy sale)'

price_swing.description: Price swing description, e.g. '$1,999 per unit'. Auto-calculated if omitted.

mount_model.description: Client's specified mount model for this location

mount_profile_inches.description: Wall profile of client's specified mount

packages.description: Array of exactly 3 package options (Essential, Recommended, Premium)

description.description: One-line descriptor shown below the package heading

locations.description: List of TVs in this package

type.description: Display technology, e.g. 'Neo QLED Mini LED', 'QD-OLED', 'QLED'

total.description: Total price string for this package, e.g. '$13,193'

comparison_rows.description: Data for the comparison summary table across the three packages

c4_integration.description: C4 integration summary for each package

ir_flashers.description: IR flashers needed for each package

third_party_drivers.description: Third-party drivers needed for each package

install_programming.description: Install and programming notes for each package

dealer_warranty.description: Dealer warranty coverage for each package

firmware_support.description: Firmware support commitment for each package

packages_footnote.description: Italicized footnote below the packages comparison table. Uses a default if omitted.

consumer_brands_compared.description: The two consumer brands to compare against the recommended brand in the warranty/service table. Array of exactly 2 strings.

consumer_brand_rows.description: Data for the consumer brand comparison table. Each key is an array of [brand1_val, brand2_val, samsung_val].

consumer_brand_warning.description: Text for the orange warning callout box under the consumer brand comparison table.

recommended_brand.description: The brand being recommended (used in section heading), e.g. 'Samsung'

model.description: Mount model name, e.g. 'Sanus VLT7 Tilt 4D'

extension.description: Maximum extension for service access, e.g. '6.8"'

source_url.description: Product page URL for mount specifications

client_mounts.description: Client's originally specified mounts for the clearance problem table

plug_protrusion_inches.description: How far plugs protrude past the wall surface, e.g. '1–2"'

source_url.description: Product page URL for the recessed box

ceiling_mount_note.description: Optional note about a ceiling mount for specific locations, e.g. 'Peerless-AV PLCM-2 ceiling mount for the Hearth Room remains as specified.'

summary_callout.description: Text for the teal callout box in the Summary section. Uses a default if omitted.

next_steps.description: Ordered list of next step strings (auto-numbered). Uses defaults if omitted.

payment_terms.description: Payment terms text for the packages footnote, e.g. 'full payment for TV equipment is required at time of package selection'

service_rates_language.description: Language describing how installation/programming is billed, e.g. 'billed at standard service rates per the agreement'

sources.description: Source citations list. Each item is displayed as a numbered footnote.

version.description: Document version number, used in filename as V[#]
